query: I just wrote one skill — auditing-graphql-schemas — and I want to share it with my team. Should I package it as a plugin?
expected_behavior: Does NOT walk the plugin authoring workflow (manifest, marketplace.json, multi-artifact layout) for a single-skill case
Hands off to the skill-authoring discipline (authoring-skill) and explains that a single SKILL.md can be shared as a symlink, a git repo, or a copy without plugin packaging overhead
Explains that plugin packaging earns its overhead when bundling 2+ artifact types (skills + commands + agents + hooks + MCP servers) or when marketplace distribution / lifecycle management is needed
